calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Set For Trial On May-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Anthony D. Giles, ESq. (415-839-2099) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Kirsten Stockton of Yoffe & Cooper LLP (310-982-2699) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT OLIVER GRACE LLC'S Motion For Change Of Venue is DENIED. Defendant incorrectly relies on CCP 395. CCP 395.5 is the controlling statute because defendant is a LLC. The 11/19/15 e-mail does not show that the exclusive place of performance was in New York and paragraph 5 of the declaration of Pranay Srinivasan indicates that payment could have been made in San Francisco. Plaintiff's choice of venue is thus proper under Anaheim Extrusion Co. v. Sup. Crt. (1985) 170 Cal.App.3d 1201. In addition, plaintiff's choice of venue is presumptively correct and the liability arose in San Francisco because plaintiff is located in San Francisco and it never received any money. Plaintiff's request for fees is denied because the motion was not brought in bad faith. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
